name: Coconut Crescents
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (3 1/2 oz size) Flaked coconut (2 2/3 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan. Add water and vanilla.
2. Combine confectioners' sugar and dry milk. Stir into the butter mixture, about half a cup at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in coconut.
3. For each candy, shape about one tablespoon of the mixture into a roll that is 2 inches long; curve to make a crescent. Refrigerate until firm (15 minutes).
4. Melt chocolate and shortening over hot, not boiling, water. Remove from hot water; let stand to cool slightly.
5. Dip half of each piece of candy into chocolate. Place on waxed paper to dry. Refrigerate until firm.
